body:
## Summary
- derive expected generated published questions after `applyQuestionLocalizationPilot`
- add `--focus-generated-localization-template-parity` with localized generated true/false option text-map checks
- register routing/summary coverage and refresh generated mutation fixtures for the localized generation pipeline

## Verification
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-localization-template-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-localization-template-parit` exits 1 with unsupported focus flag
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern "generated localization|localization overlay|applyQuestionLocalizationPilot|answer template|option text|focus-generated-localization"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: Guard generated localization template parity
